overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through an outdoor dining terrace built under industrial infrastructure. The scene features plastic furniture, neon signage, and transitions from a seated interaction to walking past other diners before reaching an overlook of a lower plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor dining terrace under industrial infrastructure

events.description: woman in pink clothing stands up from the table and walks away
player character begins walking forward through the dining area

agents.ego_description: starts at a table then walks forward through the terrace after the woman leaves, passing empty plastic tables and chairs

notable_agents.action: woman in pink clothing stands up from the table and walks away towards the left

entered.detail: rectangular white plastic dining table with bottles and cups
red plastic chair at the dining table
yellow painted partition wall separating dining sections
overhead industrial metal beams and roofing structure with hanging cables
circular cyan neon sign glowing in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the player at a white plastic table on an outdoor dining terrace. A woman in pink stands up and leaves the table around 5 seconds. The player then begins walking forward through the semi-covered area with industrial metal roofing overhead and yellow partition walls to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor dining terrace with scattered patrons

events.description: passing by a table with a seated patron wearing a gold jacket and green hair
approaching the terrace edge with metal railing overlooking the lower plaza level

agents.ego_description: walking steadily past tables with seated diners towards the terrace overlook

notable_agents.action: patron with green hair and gold jacket sitting at a table facing away from camera
patron in tank top sitting at a table drinking from a cup

entered.detail: large cyan neon sign with chevron arrows pointing downward mounted on the railing
blue metal railing marking the edge of the upper terrace
view down to the concrete plaza level below with visible pedestrians

segments.scene_description: The player walks through the dining terrace past various tables and seated patrons, including a person in a gold jacket and another in a tank top. The scene transitions as the player approaches the terrace edge, revealing a metal railing and a large neon chevron sign, with a view opening up to the plaza below.

scene_state.functional_zone: terrace overlook with view of lower plaza

events.description: camera pans down to look at the plaza level below the railing
steam or smoke rises from the plaza floor below near the pedestrians

agents.ego_description: standing at the railing looking down at the people gathered in the plaza below

notable_agents.action: group of people standing and walking in the plaza below the overlook

entered.detail: concrete plaza floor visible below with scattered litter and papers
large industrial support pillars with blue neon accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The player reaches the terrace overlook and looks down at the plaza below. A prominent cyan neon chevron sign is visible on the left. Several people are scattered across the lower plaza level, and steam rises from the ground. The camera pans down to observe the scene below the railing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from an intimate dining interaction toward an expansive overlook of a futuristic industrial plaza. It begins at a white plastic table where a woman in pink stands and departs, prompting the camera to move forward under a semi-covered metal roof flanked by yellow partition walls. As the camera advances through the terrace, it passes various seated patrons, including individuals in a gold jacket and a tank top, while the enclosed space gradually opens up. The scene then shifts toward the terrace edge, where a metal railing and a large neon chevron sign come into view. Finally, the camera pans downward from the overlook to reveal a lower plaza level where steam rises from the ground and people are scattered across the urban expanse.
